compressed_prompt: draft resume for first-job seeker, include 12 placeholders: [name], [address], etc.
response:
# Resume Template for First-Job Seekers

---

# [NAME]

[ADDRESS] | [PHONE NUMBER] | [EMAIL ADDRESS] | [LINKEDIN PROFILE URL]

---

## OBJECTIVE

A motivated and enthusiastic individual seeking an entry-level position at [COMPANY NAME] to apply my skills, gain hands-on experience, and contribute positively to the team.

---

## EDUCATION

**[DEGREE OR DIPLOMA NAME]**
[SCHOOL/UNIVERSITY NAME] — *Expected Graduation: [GRADUATION YEAR]*

* Relevant Coursework: Communication, Problem-Solving, Teamwork, and Leadership
* GPA: 3.5 / 4.0 *(include only if strong)*
* Member of student clubs and organizations

---

## SKILLS

* Strong written and verbal communication
* Basic computer proficiency (Microsoft Office, Google Workspace)
* Time management and organization
* Ability to work independently and in a team
* Quick learner with a positive attitude

---

## EXPERIENCE

**Volunteer / Part-Time / Internship Role**
*Organization or Company Name* — City, State | Month Year – Month Year

* Assisted team members with daily tasks and responsibilities
* Demonstrated reliability and punctuality in all assignments
* Developed communication and customer service skills

---

## REFERENCES

Available upon request

---

### 📌 12 Placeholders Used:
| # | Placeholder |
|---|-------------|
| 1 | [NAME] |
| 2 | [ADDRESS] |
| 3 | [PHONE NUMBER] |
| 4 | [EMAIL ADDRESS] |
| 5 | [LINKEDIN PROFILE URL] |
| 6 | [COMPANY NAME] |
| 7 | [DEGREE OR DIPLOMA NAME] |
| 8 | [SCHOOL/UNIVERSITY NAME] |
| 9 | [GRADUATION YEAR] |

> **Tip:** Be honest, keep it to **one page**, and tailor the objective for each job you apply to!
